title: Boat Rental Costs in Rovinj: A 2026 Guide
html:
Rovinj, on Croatia's Istrian coast, is a prime base for exploring the Adriatic by sea. Boat hire prices typically range from €250 for a half-day motorboat to over €2,000 for a crewed yacht. You can rent a boat directly from local owners on BoatHire24, a worldwide marketplace matching travellers with verified vessels.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Rovinj?

A motorboat for a half-day starts at around €300, while a full-day catamaran can exceed €1,500. Prices depend on boat size, season, and whether you hire a skipper. In high season (July and August), expect rates to rise by 20, 30%. One option worth a look is the Limpopo for hire.

  • Shared guided tour: from €65 per person, typically 3, 4 hours.
  • Small motorboat (up to 6 guests) half-day: €250, €400.
  • Catamaran (up to 12 guests) full-day with skipper: €1,200, €2,000.
  • Crewed luxury yacht (up to 8 guests) full-day: from €2,500.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Rovinj?

Yes, for bareboat charter you generally need an ICC or equivalent, but skippered hires are available without a licence. Croatian law requires a valid boat licence for vessels over a certain power. The operator on your booking will confirm exact requirements before departure.

In summer, the maestral wind often picks up in the afternoon, so plan morning trips for calm conditions between Rovinj and the islands of the Lim Channel.

Where to set off in Rovinj

The main departure point is the ACI Marina Rovinj, just south of the old town, offering 330 berths and full facilities. Smaller launches can use the town harbour near the main square, though space is limited. Popular day-trip destinations are the Lim Channel, a 10 km fiord reachable in 20 minutes by speedboat, and the islands of St Katarina and St Andrew. The nearby town of Vrsar, about 5 nautical miles north, has a scenic waterfront and a small marina worth visiting.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motorboat, Ideal for small groups wanting a self-drive adventure to nearby coves; up to 6 guests; from €300 half-day.
  2. Rib or tender, Best for speed and accessing shallow anchorages; up to 5 guests; from €200 half-day.
  3. Sailing yacht, For a more relaxed experience with overnight options; up to 8 guests; from €600 full-day.
  4. Catamaran, Stable and spacious, perfect for families or groups; up to 12 guests; from €1,200 full-day with skipper.
  5. Luxury motor yacht, Top-end comfort and speed, e.g. an Azimut or Sunseeker; up to 10 guests; from €2,000 full-day.

How to book your boat rental in Rovinj

Booking through BoatHire24 is straightforward: choose your boat, check availability, and pay securely online. Each listing shows the boat’s features, safety equipment, and cancellation policy. If you are new to boating, you can learn how boat rental works on the platform, including details on security deposits and optional skipper services. The whole process is managed via the website, so you can compare verified boats side by side.

At a glance

  • Price range: €65, €2,500+ per trip
  • Peak months: July and August
  • Typical trip length: 4 hours to full day
  • Maximum capacity: 12 guests on most boats
  • Licence needed? For bareboat, yes; skippered, no
  • Currency accepted: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Rovinj

Can I rent a boat without previous experience?

Yes, you can hire a skipper who will handle the boat and navigation, allowing you to relax and enjoy the scenery.

What is the best time of day for a boat trip in Rovinj?

Morning trips are generally calmer because the afternoon sea breeze (maestral) can create choppier conditions in the open Adriatic.

Are there any hidden costs I should know about?

Typical extras include fuel (if not included), a security deposit, mooring fees, and a tourist tax per person, usually around €1, 2 per day.

Can I visit the Lim Channel on a half-day rental?

Absolutely, the Lim Channel is only 5 nautical miles from Rovinj, so a 4-hour trip is enough to explore its clear waters and return.

Whether you are planning a family outing or a luxury escape, BoatHire24 makes it easy to compare options and check availability for a range of vessels in Rovinj. Owners who want to reach more travellers can also list their boat on the platform and start earning income from their asset.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Rovinj and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
